briefs.title: CapyChill 每日專輯｜海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay
briefs.focus: 10 首 × 約 3 分鐘＝約 30–35 分鐘
briefs.meta: 固定海邊書桌母場景 · 10 音樂＋1 概念圖＋6 段微動畫
briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。每張專輯維持同一天色與天氣，只變化角色行為及概念圖中預先設計的可動元素。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay". Mood: warm, unhurried, quietly optimistic. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: soft sea breeze and distant water ambience, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 68% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay; use peach sunset, muted ocean blue, warm walnut with clear golden-hour sky and calm sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 52% to 84% of the original image width. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, incense holder, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below or beside the desk. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

items.purpose: 固定構圖微動畫
items.engine: Veo 3.1 Lite 測試 → Fast 定稿
items.text: MODEL PLAN: generate one 8-second draft with Veo 3.1 Lite; use Veo 3.1 Fast only after the draft preserves the reference correctly. 安靜寫字: Image-to-video from the selected CapyChill canonical reference. Lock the camera and preserve every pixel-level layout relationship: same room, same desk, same capybara size and position, same objects, no cuts, no zoom, no pan. Motion only: natural slow breathing plus this clip's distinct action: The capybara writes slowly for most of the shot, pauses once, blinks softly, then resumes. Only slight breathing and one tiny ear twitch. Preserve the clear weather in the reference; do not create rain, snow, storms or new weather effects. Smoke and steam move continuously upward and never reverse. First and last frame must match for looping. No new objects, no morphing, no extra limbs, no liquid changing volume, no floating pencil, no moving furniture, no camera motion, no sudden lighting pulse, no text, no logos, no sound dialogue. Keep the complete character action and its primary moving prop inside the planned 9:16 portrait crop corridor as well as the full 16:9 frame.

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "清晨第一杯・First Light, First Cup". Mood: fresh, patient, lightly hopeful. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: distant gulls used sparingly and a quiet kettle, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 68% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 深夜讀寫・Midnight Pages; use navy night, warm amber pool of light, soft moon silver with clear moonlit night outside the same window. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 52% to 84% of the original image width. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, incense holder, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below or beside the desk. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

briefs.meta: 固定海邊書桌母場景 · 10 音樂＋1 概念圖＋6 段微動畫
briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。每張專輯維持同一天色與天氣，只變化角色行為及概念圖中預先設計的可動元素。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "陰天留白・Clouds Have Time". Mood: spacious, neutral, restorative. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: soft wind and distant rolling water, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 68% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 陰天留白・Clouds Have Time; use pearl grey, faded blue, warm natural wood with slow overcast clouds above the same bay. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 52% to 84% of the original image width. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, incense holder, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below or beside the desk. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 68% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 月光晚安・Moonlit Capy; use indigo, moon cream, very low amber light with quiet moon and sparse stars over the same sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 52% to 84% of the original image width. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, incense holder, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below or beside the desk. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.
